steps.title: Use the contradiction clue
steps.content: The new W boson mass measurement differs significantly from what the standard model predicts. If confirmed, a result that contradicts a theory would weaken confidence in that theory.

steps.title: Choose the weakening verb
steps.content: A means fulfill or meet, which is the opposite of the needed meaning. B means make simpler, and C means surpass or pass, neither of which describes the relationship. "Undermine" means weaken the foundation or credibility of something. The answer is D.
